perplexity-app.name: Perplexity app
perplexity-app.description: Convert a Perplexity app copy-paste into a structured note with cascaded headings and filed footnotes.

perplexity-web-download.name: Perplexity web download
perplexity-web-download.description: Convert a Perplexity web-download copy-paste into a structured note with cascaded headings and filed footnotes.

perplexity-web.name: Perplexity web
perplexity-web.description: Convert a Perplexity web copy-paste into a structured note with cascaded headings and filed footnotes.

backtick-code-tokens.name: Backtick code tokens
backtick-code-tokens.description: Backtick code-ish tokens (file:line refs, dotted identifiers, wikilinks, dataview fields) so Obsidian renders them literally. Command-only; run on a selection.
